description_long: This bungalow features a single-story rectangular structure with light gray horizontal siding and a flat roof. The front facade includes a single door and a large window, while the longer side walls are punctuated by multiple large, rectangular windows, allowing for ample natural light. The interior is divided into several rooms, visible through the open roof, with a central hallway and wood-textured flooring in select areas. The rear of the bungalow has a single window, and the overall design is simple and modern, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The exterior materials suggest a combination of wood or fiber cement siding and glass for the windows. The layout and window arrangement indicate a focus on functional, open living spaces typical of contemporary urban bungalows.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with light gray siding, large rectangular windows, and a flat roof. The interior is divided into multiple rooms with wood-textured flooring and a central hallway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance door and a large window, with the floor plan visible beside the building.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting three large rectangular windows and the extended length of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a single window and the back wall, with the floor plan to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two large windows and a glass door, emphasizing the open, airy design.
